notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Carlos Narváez reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by pitcher Jack Flaherty. Caleb Durbin scores. Marcelo Mayer to 2nd. Throwing error by pitcher Jack Flaherty.

notableEvents.label: Isiah Kiner-Falefa pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Isiah Kiner-Falefa strikes out on a foul bunt.

notableEvents.label: Ceddanne Rafaela pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Ceddanne Rafaela singles on a line drive to right fielder Wenceel Pérez. Masataka Yoshida scores. Trevor Story scores. Caleb Durbin out at home, first baseman Colt Keith to catcher Jake Rogers. Ceddanne Rafaela to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Isiah Kiner-Falefa pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Isiah Kiner-Falefa singles on a line drive to right fielder Wenceel Pérez. Masataka Yoshida scores. Trevor Story scores.

notableEvents.label: Ceddanne Rafaela pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Ceddanne Rafaela flies out to left fielder Riley Greene.

notableEvents.label: Gleyber Torres GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Gleyber Torres grounds into a double play, first baseman Willson Contreras to shortstop Trevor Story to first baseman Willson Contreras. Kevin McGonigle out at 2nd. Gleyber Torres out at 1st.

notableEvents.detail: Kerry Carpenter hit by pitch. Dillon Dingler to 2nd.
